'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 58''' was the fifty-eighth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 5]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] - Vader's Escape
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]
*[[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] - [[Geonosis droid foundries boardroom|Conference Room]]
*[[TT-40 librarian droid|TT-40 Library Droid]]
*[[Clone trooper/Legends#Equipment|Clone Trooper Weaponry]]
*[[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]]
